reason_for_decision: The revised beginner article now explains AESA more accurately, distinguishes it from adjacent architectures, and adds enough practical selection context to pass.
strengths: It gives a clean beginner explanation without flattening important architectural differences.
The AESA versus PESA versus mechanical comparison removes a common source of confusion.
The procurement-oriented questions improve the article beyond simple definition content.
summary_assessment: This article now passes. It is clear, sufficiently deep for a foundation piece, and no longer relies on the acronym alone to carry the explanation.
